overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a foggy marshland at night. The character follows a winding dirt path through dense grass and mist, passing through a broken wooden fortification with a dead body, then continuing into the open wetland.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward a wooden barricade in the distance

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through tall grass
tall green grass with blue wildflowers
tall green grass with blue wildflowers
sparse dead trees silhouetted in the mist
broken wooden fence blocking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path through a foggy marsh at night. Tall grass surrounds the trail while leafless trees stand in the mist ahead, and a broken wooden barricade becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: passing through the gap in the broken wooden barricade
passing a dead body lying on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the gap in the fence, glancing at a corpse on the ground

notable_agents.action: dead body in green clothing lying next to the fence

entered.detail: corpse of a person in green clothing lying on the ground
broken wooden wagon or cart overturned on the grass
black tattered banners on wooden poles fluttering in the wind

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through a gap in the wooden fortification, entering a more enclosed area. A dead body lies on the right next to the fence, while tattered black flags wave in the mist ahead. The character continues past the corpse and broken cart.

events.description: passing a small dilapidated wooden shed on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the open marsh, following the winding path into the fog

entered.detail: small dilapidated wooden structure partially hidden in the grass

segments.scene_description: Beyond the fortification, the marsh opens up into a wide grassy wetland. Geralt continues along the path through dense vegetation, passing a small wooden shed on the right. The fog thickens in the distance as the trail winds deeper into the swamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy marshland that gradually opens into a wide, desolate wetland. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall grass and leafless trees that loom within the nighttime mist. As the camera advances, the path leads through a gap in a broken wooden fortification, passing a dead body and a ruined cart while tattered black flags wave in the haze. The scene then expands beyond the barricade into a broad grassy expanse, where the character moves past a small wooden shed. Finally, the trail winds deeper into the swamp as the fog thickens, obscuring the horizon of the open marsh.
